title: K-200 Integration Maintenance Procedure
text:
# K-200 Integration Maintenance Procedure

Document number: MD-DOC-422-C. Revision: C. Type: manual. Author: Tobias Wren. Created: 2025-04-04. Last modified: 2026-02-06. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Integration subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1139, P-1011, P-1113.
